title: Artificial Intelligence in Education: A Systematic Overview
abstract: This survey discusses artificial intelligence in education, including tutoring systems, personalization, automated feedback, learning analytics and ethical challenges in classrooms and higher education.

title: Generative AI and ChatGPT in Higher Education
abstract: The paper analyzes how generative AI and ChatGPT are used by university students and teachers for writing, assessment, feedback, academic integrity and learning support.

title: Intelligent Tutoring Systems for Mathematics Learning
abstract: This work presents an intelligent tutoring system that adapts hints, exercises and explanations to student knowledge during mathematics learning activities.

title: Learning Analytics for Student Performance Prediction
abstract: This study uses machine learning and learning analytics to predict student performance from activity logs, grades and engagement indicators in online courses.

title: Educational Data Mining for Dropout Prediction
abstract: The paper evaluates educational data mining methods for early dropout prediction, comparing logistic regression, decision trees, support vector machines and neural networks.

title: Adaptive Learning Systems Based on Machine Learning
abstract: Adaptive learning systems personalize educational content and sequence recommendations using machine learning models trained on learner behavior and assessment results.

title: Automated Feedback for Student Writing
abstract: This article investigates natural language processing methods for automated feedback in writing education, including grammar, coherence, argumentation and revision suggestions.

title: Large Language Models in Educational Technology
abstract: Large language models are evaluated as educational technology tools for question answering, tutoring, formative assessment and instructional content generation.

title: Personalized Learning with Recommender Systems
abstract: The study explores AI recommender systems for personalized learning paths, recommending resources and activities according to student needs and prior knowledge.

title: Ethics and Bias in AI-Based Education Systems
abstract: This paper discusses fairness, transparency, privacy and bias in artificial intelligence systems deployed in schools and universities.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Educational Question Answering
abstract: The work proposes a retrieval-augmented generation system for educational question answering, combining document retrieval with language models to support students.

title: Machine Learning for Classroom Engagement Detection
abstract: This paper uses multimodal machine learning to detect classroom engagement from video, audio and interaction data in educational environments.

title: AI Tutors for Programming Education
abstract: The study presents AI tutors that provide feedback, hints and debugging support to students learning introductory programming.

title: Evaluation of Chatbots for Student Support Services
abstract: Educational chatbots are evaluated for answering administrative and academic questions, improving student support services and reducing response time.

title: Deep Learning for Knowledge Tracing
abstract: Deep learning models are used for knowledge tracing, estimating student mastery over time and supporting adaptive tutoring decisions.
